历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 4860 → 5569 → 14804 → 15387 → 18114, showing a continuous and significant downward trend, especially with a notable jump in 2023 (a drop of 9235 positions compared to 2022), and a cumulative drop of about 12545 positions in the last three years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 18114, a drop of 2727 positions from 2024, with a slowing but still significant decline rate; the provincial enrollment plan for Physics Category was 6, 6, and 5 students from 2021 to 2023, sharply dropping to 2 students in 2024 (significant reduction), and recovering to 6 students in 2025; the 2026 plan remains at 6 students, unchanged from 2025, with a stable plan having a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; the Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 93rd in 2021 to 81st in 2026, with a steady improvement in recent years, enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and recognition; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion shocks; the overall Douyin popularity ranking is 49th (relatively hot), with stable application attention; there were no abnormal admissions or gaps from 2021 to 2025; Foreign Language and Literature is an A+ discipline (top in the country), and among the Physics Category admissions majors, Data Science and Big Data Technology is an interdisciplinary field, while Law, Spanish, etc., are closely related to the university's advantageous language disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Data Science and Big Data Technology belongs to the computer category, with a popularity index of 67.8 in 2024 (recommended but cooling); Law is polarized and under observation; the total number of examinees in Hebei Province in 2026 is about 609,800, with an estimated Physics Category examinee count of about 368,929 based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 60.5%, an increase of about 5,889 from 363,040 in 2025, intensifying competition; the provincial control line for the Physics Category undergraduate batch has risen from 412 points in 2021 to 459 points in 2025, showing an upward trend.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous and significant downward trend in historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the increase in Physics Category examinees (intensified competition), and the rise in university ranking (enhanced attractiveness), it is expected that the 2026 ranking will continue to drop slightly from the 2025 baseline of 18,114; the predicted minimum ranking is about 18,164, with a range of 17,664 to 18,664.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Data Science and Big Data Technology (Natural Language Processing and Financial Big Data).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- No other Physics Category admissions majors currently available; it is recommended to refer to other categories or batches of this university.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range (17,664–18,664), it is recommended to focus on Data Science and Big Data Technology as the main direction; for rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 17,664), key sprinting is advised; for rankings near the upper limit of the range (around 18,664), careful application is needed, and it is recommended to combine with other universities as a safety net. There are few Physics Category admissions majors, so application options are limited.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 793 → 1087 → 1496 → 2189 → 2295, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1502 positions in the past 4 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 2295, only 106 positions behind 2024, indicating a significant slowdown in the backward shift; the provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 5 students from 2021 to 2023, expanded to 9 in 2024, and reduced to 8 in 2025; the 2026 plan remains at 8, unchanged from 2025, with a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; the main ranking of Soft Science has steadily risen from 93rd in 2021 to 81st in 2026, with a steady improvement in recent years, enhancing the school's comprehensive strength and recognition. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is neutral/mixed, with only an air conditioning fee dispute incident, no major negative public opinion impact; Douyin heat total ranking is 49th (relatively hot), with medium to high exposure on short video platforms, maintaining stable application attention; no abnormal filing/gap records from 2021 to 2025; Foreign Language and Literature is an A+ discipline (top in the country), highly matching the school's language-related admissions majors, strongly attracting language-oriented candidates.

专业热度与地域.text: Foreign language majors had a heat index of 52.15 in 2024 (generally wait-and-see), while Journalism and Communication majors are clearly discouraged; the total number of candidates in Hebei Province for 2026 is about 609,800, with an estimated History Category proportion of about 39.5% in recent years, resulting in about 240,871 History Category candidates, a slight decrease of about 2,843 from 2025's 243,714, slightly easing competitive pressure; the History Category undergraduate batch provincial control line has risen from 454 points in 2021 to 477 points in 2025, showing an upward trend.
